nodes.label: Unit tests for StraightLineCalculator — ATB-1 & ATB-3 verification.  Coverage ta
Round *value* to 2 decimal places with ROUND_HALF_UP.
ATB-1.1 — Verify standard straight-line annual / monthly depreciation.
ATB-1.1: Sum of all annual amounts must equal (original_cost - salvage_value).
ATB-1.1: generate_schedule() must return exactly useful_life_years entries.
ATB-1.1: After full depreciation the book value must equal salvage_value.
ATB-1.2 — Residual value is zero; full original cost must be depreciated.
ATB-1.2: Total depreciated amount must equal original_cost when salvage=0.
ATB-1.3 — Single-year asset; full depreciable base consumed in year 1.
ATB-1.3: Schedule for a 1-year asset must contain exactly one entry.
ATB-1.4 — Non-terminating division must be rounded to 2 dp (ROUND_HALF_UP).
ATB-1.4: Monthly = annual / 12, must also be rounded to 2 dp.
ATB-1.4: annual_depreciation must never exceed 2 decimal places.
ATB-1.5 — When (original_cost - salvage_value) is not evenly divisible     by (u
ATB-1.5: Sum of all *monthly* schedule entries must equal depreciable base.
ATB-1.5: Regardless of rounding in intermediate periods, the final         book
ATB-1.5: Book value must decrease (or stay equal) period-over-period.
ATB-3.1 – 3.4 — Invalid inputs must raise appropriate exceptions.
ATB-3.1: salvage_value == original_cost → ValueError (depreciable base is 0).
ATB-3.4 (boundary): salvage_value == original_cost * 50% must NOT raise.
Verify that plain int / float inputs are accepted and handled correctly.
Calculator should accept plain int inputs without raising TypeError.
Calculator should accept numeric strings that Decimal() can parse.
Verify that each entry returned by generate_schedule() has the expected shape.
Return a standard StraightLineCalculator for structural assertions.
Each schedule entry must expose a `depreciation` attribute.
Each schedule entry must expose a `book_value` attribute.
Each schedule entry must expose a `period` (year or period number).
Periods must be sequential starting at 1.
Every annual depreciation charge in the schedule must be > 0.
Straight-line: all intermediate depreciation entries must be equal.          The
